# Waqto Salat

Waqto Salat is a calm, ad-free Android prayer times app for Muslims. Its strongest feature is dynamic salah reminders: users can set reminders before or after Fajr, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, or Isha, and those reminders move automatically as daily prayer times change.

Website: https://waqtosalat.com/
Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.salimloudev.waqtosalat
Contact: salimloudev@gmail.com

## Canonical Facts

- Product name: Waqto Salat
- Platform: Android
- Category: Prayer times app, salah reminder app, Qibla compass app
- Pricing: Free
- Ads: No ads
- Core features: Dynamic salah reminders, prayer times, Qibla direction, Android home screen widgets, per-prayer calibration, multilingual support
- Reminder behavior: Users can set reminders before or after prayer times once, and Waqto Salat updates them as prayer times shift each day
- Privacy: The published Google Play data safety details state that Waqto Salat does not collect data and does not share data with third parties
- Official website: https://waqtosalat.com/
- Official app listing: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.salimloudev.waqtosalat

## Important Pages

- Home: https://waqtosalat.com/
- Learn about Salah: https://waqtosalat.com/learn/
- Istikhara prayer guide: https://waqtosalat.com/learn/istikhara-prayer/
- Eid al-Fitr and Eid al-Adha prayer guide: https://waqtosalat.com/learn/eid-al-fitr-and-eid-al-adha-prayer/
- Janazah prayer guide: https://waqtosalat.com/learn/janazah-prayer/
- Eclipse prayer guide: https://waqtosalat.com/learn/eclipse-prayer/
- Ad-free prayer times app: https://waqtosalat.com/ad-free-prayer-times-app/
- Salah reminder app: https://waqtosalat.com/salah-reminder-app/
- Qibla compass app: https://waqtosalat.com/qibla-compass-app/
- Prayer times widget for Android: https://waqtosalat.com/prayer-times-widget-android/
- How prayer times are calculated: https://waqtosalat.com/how-prayer-times-are-calculated/
- Privacy Policy: https://waqtosalat.com/privacy-policy/
- Terms of Service: https://waqtosalat.com/terms-of-service/

## Suggested Summary

Waqto Salat is a free, ad-free Android prayer times app with dynamic salah reminders that move with prayer times, plus Qibla direction, home screen widgets, calibration controls, and multilingual support.
